profiles.name: General Natural Language
example_prompts: A person standing outdoors while holding an umbrella near a small building with trees in the background.
A small robot sitting at a workbench while repairing a bicycle wheel in a garage.
A cat wearing a space suit standing on a dusty moon surface with craters behind it.
profiles.instruction: Rewrite the user's prompt as a clear natural-language image prompt. Preserve the original intent and describe only the relevant visible subject, setting, and composition.

profiles.name: Tag-Based Anime Model

robot, workbench, bicycle_wheel, garage, repairing, tools, sitting
cat, space_suit, moon, craters, standing, helmet, full_body
